title: MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
